Class-Sorcerer 20 — Male Human Sorcerer: 20
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 10 (+0) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 10 (+0) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Constitution: 3; Dexterity: 1; Strength: 1 Experience: 840177/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Durable: +1 Constitution
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 5 to distribute
Dragon Wings: Can use a bonus action to gain a 60' fly Speed for 1 hr once per long rest; can expend 3 sorcery points for additional uses
Revelation In Flesh: Can use a bonus action and spend 1 sorcery point to gain a 30' fly Speed, a 60' swim Speed and water breathing, or the ability to squeeze through a 1" space, for 10 min
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Metamagic): 6; Sorcerer (Sorcerer Subclass): 1
Feats: Alert; Boon Of Truesight; Durable; Grappler; Musician; Savage Attacker; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Sorcerer Features: Aberrant Sorcery; Arcane Apotheosis; Bastion Of Law; Bend Luck; Careful Spell; Clockwork Cavalcade; Clockwork Sorcery; Clockwork Spells; Controlled Chaos; Distant Spell; Draconic Resilience; Draconic Sorcery; Draconic Spells; Dragon Companion; Dragon Wings; Elemental Affinity; Empowered Spell; Epic Boon; Extended Spell; Font Of Magic; Heightened Spell; Innate Sorcery; Metamagic; Psionic Sorcery; Psionic Spells; Psychic Defenses; Quickened Spell; Restore Balance; Revelation In Flesh; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Seeking Spell; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerer Subclass; Sorcerous Restoration; Sorcery Incarnate; Spellcasting; Subtle Spell; Tamed Surge; Telepathic Speech; Tides Of Chaos; Trance Of Order; Transmuted Spell; Twinned Spell; Warping Implosion; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons); Wild Magic Sorcery; Wild Magic Surge Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Metamagic: 6 selections
Sorcerer Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Clockwork Spells: Displays a physical manifestation of Clockwork Soul
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Revelation In Flesh: Can use a bonus action and spend 1 sorcery point to see invisible creatures within 60' for 10 min
Trance Of Order: Can use a bonus action to score a minimum of 10 on attack, ability, and saving rolls for 1 min once per long rest; can expend 5 sorcery points for each additional use
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +0 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +8 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +6 Investigation: (int) +0 Religion: (int) +6
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +0
Deception: (cha) +8 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +0
History: (int) +0 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Arcana; Deception; Insight; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Dulcimer: (cha); Pan Flute: (cha); Shawm: (cha); Viol: (cha)
Languages: Common; Dwarvish; Elvish
Skill Notes:
Musician: Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any Musical Instrument)
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Musician: Can give Heroic Inspiration to 6 allies at the end of a rest
Telepathic Speech: R30' Can use a bonus action to gain telepathic communication with the target in a shared language while within 2 miles for 20 min
Combat
Hit Points: 157 Initiative: +6 Armor Class: 12
Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Club (+9 1d4+3 B; Slow); Light Crossbow (+6 1d8 P R80/320; Slow); Shortbow (+6 1d6 P R80/320; Vex); Unarmed Strike (+9 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Draconic Resilience: +20 Hit Points/+2 Armor Class in no armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Bastion Of Law: R30' Can spend 1 - 5 sorcery points to negate an equal number of d8s HP damage to the target before the next use or long rest
Bend Luck: Can spend 1 sorcery point to add or subtract 1d4 from a target attack, ability check, or save
Durable: Can use a bonus action to regain hit points from a Hit Die roll
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Restore Balance: R60' Can cancel a target's advantage or disadvantage on a roll 2 times per long rest
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Tides Of Chaos: Can gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save once per long rest; subsequently using a spell slot to cast a Sorcerer spell before a long rest automatically causes a Wild Magic Surge and allows an additional use
Trance Of Order: Can use a bonus action to negate advantage on attacks on self for 1 min once per long rest; can expend 5 sorcery points for each additional use
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +8; Constitution: +9; Dexterity: +0; Intelligence: +0; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes:
Durable: Has advantage on death saves
Elemental Affinity: Has resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison
Psychic Defenses: Has resistance to psychic damage and advantage vs. charmed and frightened
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; S0: 6; S: 22 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 3; S6: 2; S7: 2; S8: 1; S9: 1 Attack: C: +8; S: +8 Spell DC: C: 16; S: 16
Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Aid (S2 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 hit points]
Alarm (S1 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): R30' Entry into a 20' cube by a non-designated Tiny or larger creature triggers an audible or mental alarm for 8 hr [R]
Alter Self (S2 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains natural weapons with +8 attack and 1d6+2 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Eye (S4 [Draconic Spells] Divi): R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Arms Of Hadar (S1 [Psionic Spells] Conj): 10' radius inflicts 2d6 HP necrotic and loss of reactions (save Strength half HP only) for 1 rd [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Calm Emotions (S2 [Psionic Spells] Ench): R60' 20' radius suppresses a choice of charmed and frightened or hostility (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Charm Monster (S4 Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Monster (S4 [Draconic Spells] Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Chill Touch (S0 Necr): Touch inflicts 4d10 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Chromatic Orb (S1 [Draconic Spells] Evoc): R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage dice indicates that the spell leaps to attack another target within 30' of the first [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 times]
Cloudkill (S5 Conj): R120' 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half) and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Command (S1 [Draconic Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Darkvision (S2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Detect Magic (S1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (S2 [Psionic Spells] Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dimension Door (S4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (S1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Dispel Magic (S3 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dissonant Whispers (S1 [Psionic Spells] Ench): R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and forces the target to use its reaction to flee (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Dragon's Breath (S2 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Earthquake (S8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Evard's Black Tentacles (S4 [Psionic Spells] Conj): R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain, 3d6 HP bludgeoning, and restrained (save Strength negates, Athletics breaks free) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (S3 [Draconic Spells] Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Fireball (S3 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Fly (S3 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Freedom Of Movement (S4 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (S9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Restoration (S5 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Hunger Of Hadar (S3 [Psionic Spells] Conj): R150' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 2d6 HP cold at the start of their turns (no save) and 2d6 HP acid at the end of their turns (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Legend Lore (S5 [Draconic Spells] Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Lesser Restoration (S2 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Mending (S0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mind Sliver (S0 [Psionic Spells] Ench): R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP psychic and -1d4 on the target's next save within 1 rd (save Intelligence negates)
Minor Illusion (S0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Move Earth (S6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Poison Spray (S0 Necr): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 4d12 HP poison
Prismatic Spray (S7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Protection From Energy (S3 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Evil And Good (S1 [Clockwork Spells] Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Rary's Telepathic Bond (S5 [Psionic Spells] Divi): R30' 8 willing targets can communicate mentally for 1 hr [R]
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Sending (S3 [Psionic Spells] Evoc): Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Spider Climb (S2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Stinking Cloud (S3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Summon Aberration (S4 [Psionic Spells] Conj): R90' Summons an obedient aberrant spirit (Armor Class 15; 40 hit points; move 30'; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type beholderkin (R150' inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic; fly 30'), slaad (inflicts 1d10+7 HP slashing and negates healing for 1 rd; regenerates 5 hit points per rd), or star spawn (inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic, plus 2d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) in a 5' radius) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1]
Summon Construct (S4 [Clockwork Spells] Conj): R90' Summons an obedient construct spirit (Armor Class 17; 40 hit points; move 30'; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d8+8) of clay (attacks an adjacent creature or moves 15' as a reaction to damage), metal (inflicts 1d10 HP fire on adjacent melee attackers), or stone (can inflict half Speed and loss of reactions (save Wisdom negates) on creatures within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and attack damage by 1]
Summon Dragon (S5 [Draconic Spells] Conj): R60' Summons an obedient draconic spirit for concentration up to 1 hr; it has Armor Class 19, 50 hit points, 30' Speed, 60' fly Speed, 30' swim Speed, 2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6 + 9 HP piercing, a breath weapon that inflicts 2d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison in a 30' cone, and resistance to the same damage type; self also gains this resistance [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, and piercing damage by 1]
Summon Dragon (S5 [Dragon Companion] Conj): R60' Summons an obedient draconic spirit for concentration up to 1 hr; it has Armor Class 19, 50 hit points, 30' Speed, 60' fly Speed, 30' swim Speed, 2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6 + 9 HP piercing, a breath weapon that inflicts 2d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison in a 30' cone, and resistance to the same damage type; self also gains this resistance [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, and piercing damage by 1]
Telekinesis (S5 [Psionic Spells] Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Wall Of Force (S5 [Clockwork Spells] Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10' impassable force panels or a 10' radius impassible force dome or globe for concentration up to 10 min; the effect extends into the ethereal plane
Water Breathing (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Magic Notes:
Arcane Apotheosis: While using Innate Sorcery, can use 1 Metamagic option each turn without spending sorcery points
Careful Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to give 2 creatures a successful save and no damage instead of half on a self spell
Clockwork Cavalcade: 30' cube restores 100 hit points total among targets, repairs damaged objects, and dispels target spells up to 6th level once per long rest; can expend 7 sorcery points for each additional use
Controlled Chaos: Can choose from 2 effects when triggering a Wild Magic Surge
Distant Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to double the range of a spell or to give a touch spell a 30' range
Dragon Companion: Can cast Summon Dragon without expending a spell slot once per long rest, can cast it without material components, and can make its duration 1 min instead of concentration
Elemental Affinity: Spells that deal a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison inflict +2 HP
Empowered Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll 2 spell damage dice; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Extended Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to double the duration of a spell, up to a 24 hr maximum, and to gain advantage on any concentration saves
Font Of Magic: Can use 20 sorcery points per long rest, convert spell slots to sorcery points, and use a bonus action to convert sorcery points to a spell slot
Heightened Spell: Can spend 2 sorcery points to inflict disadvantage on a target's saves vs. a self spell
Innate Sorcery: Can use a bonus action to gain +1 spell DC and advantage on spell attacks for 1 min 2 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Psionic Sorcery: Can cast a Psionic Spells spell using sorcery points equal to the spell level and no verbal or somatic components
Quickened Spell: Can spend 2 sorcery points to use a bonus action to cast a 1-action spell; cannot cast additional spells in the same turn
Seeking Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a failed spell attack; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Sorcerous Restoration: Can regain 10 sorcery points after a short rest once per long rest
Sorcery Incarnate: Can spend 2 sorcery points for additional uses of Innate Sorcery, and can use 2 Metamagic options on each spell
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Subtle Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without somatic, material, or verbal components
Tamed Surge: Can add a chosen Wild Magic effect when casting a spell once per long rest
Transmuted Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to change the damage type of an acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder spell to a different type from that list
Twinned Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to increase a spell's level by 1 so that it affects a second target
Warping Implosion: Can teleport 120', inflicting 3d10 HP force and a 30' pull (save Strength half HP only) in a 30' radius around the starting position, once per long rest; can expend 5 sorcery points per additional use
Wild Magic Surge: Casting a spell has a 5% chance of unleashing a random magic effect
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 7 available vs. 14 allocated
